creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229228
Patch for pcre2

Use upstream release archive which is significantly smaller in size
This is also recommended by Porter's Handbook instead of using USE_GITHUB
While at it, also switch PORTVERSION to DISTVERSION to follow Porter's Handbook more closely.

Tested on FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #1 stable/13-n247248-fc1b69d0311 (amd64)
